human_actions_pending.action: Manual browser test: open Tambah Pengingat → Pengingat Obat → fill form with 1 hari aktif → klik Simpan → expect toast.success
human_actions_pending.context: The multer single-string hariAktif bug was fixed on backend (z.preprocess). Need to confirm the actual save flow works end-to-end before marking Phase 02 truly complete.

human_actions_pending.action: Remove console.log debug lines from MedicationReminderForm.tsx (lines ~90-102) before production deploy
human_actions_pending.context: Debug logging added to diagnose payload issues — should not ship to production.

decisions.decision: Fix multer single-string hariAktif in backend via z.preprocess (coerce string → array)
decisions.rationale: multer sends fd.append('hariAktif', 'Senin') as plain string when user selects 1 day. z.array() fails on string. Backend preprocess is cleaner than sending JSON stringified array from frontend.

decisions.decision: Modal vertical centering via sm:inset-auto sm:top-1/2 sm:left-1/2 sm:-translate-x-1/2 sm:-translate-y-1/2
decisions.rationale: SheetContent side=bottom hardcodes inset-x-0 bottom-0. sm:inset-auto overrides to allow transform-based centering. Better than margin-based mx-auto which only centers horizontally.

decisions.decision: Scrollbar moved from SheetContent to inner form div using flex-1 min-h-0
decisions.rationale: SheetContent already is flex flex-col (from shadcn). Making inner div flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto is the correct CSS pattern for overflow within flex container. Gives cleaner pr-2 spacing from scrollbar.

next_action: Commit the 5 uncommitted hotfix files, then manually test Pengingat Obat form in browser (1-day selection), then update VERIFICATION.md status to passed, then start Phase 03 with /gsd-plan-phase 3
context_notes: Phase 02 had 4 critical bugs found by verification agent. All 4 + 3 additional UI/UX issues have been fixed across this session. The last remaining uncertainty is whether the multer hariAktif backend fix (z.preprocess) + toast error surfacing together resolves the 'tidak merespon' symptom the user reported. Debug console.log is temporary and must be removed.
